top_signals.title: Jamie Dimon Says Interest Rates Could Be Much Higher From Here
top_signals.summary: Jamie Dimon said interest rates may climb much higher from current levels, a warning to bond investors at a time when yields have touched multi-year highs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ukraine probes teen suspect in cyber theft scheme targeting California online shoppers
top_signals.summary: The investigation began after U.S. authorities informed their Ukrainian counterparts that hackers operating from Ukraine could be involved in attacks targeting users of American e-commerce platforms, Ukraine's Prosecutor General said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
